nasb.text: Now why are you discouraging the sons of Israel from crossing over into the land which the Lord has given them?

esv.text: Why will you discourage the heart of the people of Israel from going over into the land that the Lord has given them?

cnv.text: 你們為甚麼使以色列人灰心，不過河到耶和華賜給他們的地那裡去呢？

ccb.text: 你们为何使以色列人军心动摇，不敢进入耶和华所赐之地？
